body.body: Implement bidirectional GitHub sync as step 0 of the Organizer phase. Pull open issues from GitHub, compare to DB ticket nodes, apply deltas: new tickets → insert as nodes, human-closed tickets → mark done, updated bodies → merge. DB becomes current truth before Organizer proceeds to summarise. Ref: D130.
body.title: Organizer step 0: GitHub → DB sync
body.result: github_tickets table in Postgres. github_sync.py: sync/list/delta. First sync: 80 open + 30 closed. Becomes Organizer step 0.
